name: Mysterious Request
description:
“E-Excuse me..can you tell me where I am on this phone map..?

(PLEASE TAKE ME TO THE CLOSEST ALLEYWAY AND TITTYFUCK ME)

Hello everyone! First I’d like to say I missed you all! Second I’d like to tell everyone why I was gone

Graduation! I actually graduated and was so focused on my last few weeks that I had no time to make bots, I’m sorry and I hope you guys all understand, I should’ve been more open about it. But it’s summertime, and I’d like to make it up to all of you!

Since this bot won the poll (which I will show on the bottom) this bot was made first!

Of course I’ll make the other bots some other day, but a promise is a promise!

So enjoy this bot and I’ll see you guys on the next one!

(This bot is probably the most goonerest bot I ever made, if you’re my friend and see this, I’m sorry)

Okay bye bye now! I love you all! 🤍🤍

Artist: Dizzyspells
